testimonials.quote: ...Dan has taken on many extra responsibilities such as creating and updating python scripts, and helping develop a tool that automated the MOP creation process. He was instrumental in training the team and mentoring new team members. I recommend Dan for these reasons, his willingness to always help anyone who needed it and his strong leadership abilities.

...Daniel is an exceptionally hard worker and highly productive. What sets him apart is his technical leadership; he has sucessfully trained numerous team members on advanced routing protocols, including BGP and IGP configurations. He would be a massive asset to any any engineering team.
